item.title: Knowing the signs of meningitis
item.description: Meningitis is a life-threatening infectious disease and students can be vulnerable to it due to close living arrangements.

item.title: Nottingham retains Purple Flag for safe and vibrant nightlife
item.description: Nottingham has been granted the Purple Flag award for the sixteenth consecutive year! The award recognises the diversity, vibrancy and safety of a night out in the city.

item.title: Neurodiversity Celebration Week 2026: Moving from Awareness to Action
item.description: Get involved in our range of events and help NTU move from awareness to meaningful action this Neurodiversity Celebration Week.

item.title: Your Voice. Your University. Your Students’ Union.
item.description: What should NTU look like in five years’ time? What kind of university should it become, and what should it be known for? Have your say now and you could win a £50 Love2shop voucher.

item.title: Give back. Get paid. Boost your life skills. Become a Student Mentor.
item.description: Don't miss out on this fantastic opportunity – apply by Friday 6 March.

item.title: Last chance to unlock your potential with our free Pathways to Progress workshops
item.description: Focus on your personal development – sign up for one of our sessions in March.

item.title: Give to Gain: Celebrate International Women’s Day at NTU
item.description: International Women’s Day (IWD) is coming up on Sunday 8 March and NTU is proud to be hosting a range of events throughout the month to celebrate the occasion. Find out how you can get involved.

item.title: Volunteer locally and get a ticket to an exclusive Tinie Tempah show at Rock City
item.description: As part of Student Volunteering Week 2026 NTU is supporting the launch of Nottingham RockCorps.

item.title: Take a moment for you with NTU Wellbeing Week
item.description: From Monday 9 to Friday 13 March, take a moment for you with a week of events and activities designed to celebrate and support your wellbeing.

item.title: Live music to look forward to this term
item.description: There are lots of opportunities to enjoy live music on campus and beyond with NTU Arts over the next few weeks.
